Product Name Known Issues Solution Sources
RTX 5070 Ti Stats screen flickering (7inch display) Update GPU drivers and monitor firmware View Discussion
RTX 5070 Black screen and reboots after installation Uninstall old drivers first, use DDU (Display Driver Uninstaller) View Discussion
RTX 5070 RTX 5070 Graphic and performance issues. Uninstall old drivers first, use DDU (Display Driver Uninstaller) View Discussion
RTX 3080 3080 issue after update to new drivers None as of yet View Discussion
RTX 3090 RTX 3090 Keeps Crashing None as of yet View Discussion
RTX 3060 RTX 3060 Keeps Crashing None as of yet View Discussion
RTX 3050 RTX 3050 Freezing issue https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/geforce/news/dune-spice-wars-game-ready-driver View Discussion
